zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John Sempill, 4th Lord Elliotstoun於大約1370年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾時，他的父親Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III23歲，母親Mrs. John de Sempill21歲。他和NN Montgomery至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1445年在蘇格蘭享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John Sempill, 4th Lord Elliotstoun于大约1370年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾时，他的父亲Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III23岁，母亲Mrs. John de Sempill21岁。他和NN Montgomery至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1445年在苏格兰享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sempill,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Semple
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): nickname from Middle English, Older Scots, and Old French simple ‘simple, straightforward, humble’ (from Latin simplus). The Scottish name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century, and a Scottish family of this name held the hereditary post of Sheriff of Renfrewshire from the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John Sempill, 4th Lord Elliotstoun was born about 1370, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III, was 23 and his mother, Mrs. John de Sempill, was 21. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with NN Montgomery. He died about 1445, in Scotland, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John Sempill, 4th Lord Elliotstoun est né environ 1370, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John de Sempill, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec NN Montgomery. Il est décédé environ 1445, à Écosse, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John Sempill, 4th Lord Elliotstoun um 1370 in Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III 23 und seine Mutter Mrs. John de Sempill 21. Er hatte mit NN Montgomery mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1445 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Sempill, 4th Lord Elliotstoun è nato il circa 1370 nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. John de Sempill, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con NN Montgomery. Morì circa 1445, nel Scotland, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John Sempill, 4th Lord Elliotstounが約1370年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun IIIは23歳，母Mrs. John de Sempillは21歳であった。彼はNN Montgomeryとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1445年にスコットランドで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John Sempill, 4th Lord Elliotstoun(이)가 대략 1370년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John de Sempill(은)는 21세였다. 그는 NN Montgomery(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1445년 스컷랜드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Sempill, 4th Lord Elliotstoun nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John de Sempill, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com NN Montgomery. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1445, em Scotland, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John Sempill, 4th Lord Elliotstoun родился около 1370 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John de Sempill, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от NN Montgomery. Он умер около 1445 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 77 лет.

sm.about 1370–about 1445: e tusa o le 1370–e tusa o le 1445

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John Sempill, 4th Lord Elliotstoun nació aproximadamente 1370, en Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John de Sempill of Eliotstoun III, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mrs. John de Sempill, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con NN Montgomery. Murió aproximadamente 1445, en Scotland, a la edad de 77 años.
